review_text: Just had my first session at the clinic, the experience was extremely pleasant from beginning to end!

I had an excellent experience with Removery for tattoo removal. From the first consultation, the staff was knowledgeable, transparent about the process, and set realistic expectations for my specific tattoo. The technicians are clearly well-trained and use top-tier laser technology.
Sessions were efficient, relatively comfortable, and they walked me through aftercare each time. My tattoo has faded significantly faster than I expected. The clinic is clean, modern, and the team genuinely cares about results. If you want professional tattoo removal done right, Removery is the place.
Patience , well informative and the MOST friendly staff . Thank you Diane & Desaray :)

I had a great experience with Removery Tattoo! From the moment I walked in, everyone was incredibly kind, welcoming, and professional. After my consultation, I was even able to start my treatment the same day, which was a huge plus.

They took their time to thoroughly explain the entire process, what to expect during each session, and how to properly care for my skin at home in between treatments. I really appreciated how detailed and informative they were — it made me feel comfortable and confident moving forward. Diane and Desaray are the best!

If you’re considering tattoo removal, I definitely recommend Removery. Great service, knowledgeable staff, and a very smooth experience overall! ✨
The staff members are great and friendly, ensuring that your needs are met and you feel comfortable throughout the treatment process.
Nice, pleasant and knowledgeable. Effective and efficient. Great experience!

I recently went for a consultation and was assisted by Diane who was very kind and welcoming. She walked me through the removal process, answered all my questions, and was very informative, Overall a great experience!

Came to Removery for just a consultation, but ended up having my first session! The process was easy and near painless! Diane and Desaray were so kind and made me feel right at home! I can’t wait for my future sessions!
Amazing experience with removery! Love the office!!!
This place is very professional, all the people who work there are very friendly. Decirey works fast and my experience was excellent in that place

This location is my favorite. I started my tattoo removal journey in Georgia. I’ve had treatments in Arizona as well. This location is the best. The staff are friendly, knowledgeable and personable. Thank you Diane and Desaray for always being fast! I always feel like I’m going to see friends when I arrive.
Very informative. Great bedside manner! Changed my location to keep seeing her
I love talking to the staff, they are such openly fun people and easy to talk to. Love it here.

Desaray and Diane are the best
This location is 10/10
Amazing energy from both ladies and made my girlfriend feel comfortable. Thank You
Very warm atmosphere
Everyone is so nice, love this location! My tattoo is making good process and fading well!

Good experience with Removery! The staff is professional, the space is clean, and the process is quick and straightforward. I’ve already seen noticeable fading and feel confident I’m in good hands. Highly recommend!

Desiree is literally the best! I went to many different locations and she is the best most efficient technician there is. She faded my tattoo way quicker than any other office so far she definitely pays attention to detail and is a true professional when it comes to removal. I will only trust her for the rest of my tattoo removal process. Also, the lady at the front desk is so sweet at this location. 100% recommend
Really appreciated the free consultation. I feel so much more clear on the process and options - everyone was very nice and welcoming as well.

Update to original review: just finished my 9th session. Desaray was my tech and made things as comfortable as possible. Very good session. Getting close to being done!

Just finished my second session at Removery Hedwig Village and Morgan and Jerry are the freaking best. Excellent bedside manner. This session was better than the first (I was probably very surprised at the first session) because I was better prepared mentally and physically for this session. Jerry is super patient during the session and I’m so grateful that they’re making this experience what it is for me. Thank you both, see ya in a couple months.

I went for my first session yesterday and I’m already so impressed! The team made me feel comfortable and confident in my decision to get the laser removal on my tattoos and took their time explaining everything to me. I’m so glad I chose Removery for this process. After one session, I’m already seeing a huge change in my tattoos.
Had my first appointment today! Diane and Desiree were amazing. Glad to have them both on this journey

Diane and Desaray were so kind, knowledgeable, and helpful!

Diane was great with explaining payment plans, scheduling, etc. I felt very taken care of and the fact that she remembered little details about my family and I was amazing!

Desaray is extremely well versed in the procedure and after care. She made me feel so safe and took all my nerves away! She was very patient but made the process go by so fast.

Can’t wait for the next session!

I recently came to Removery for a consultation and both Diane and Desaray were amazing! Diane helped me with my consult and walked me through the entire process of getting my tattoos removed and was very friendly and helpful about any questions I had. Desaray was also very friendly and explained the laser tattoo removal process in depth and made me feel comfortable during my first session. I will definitely recommend them to anyone looking to start the tattoo removal process!
My experience at removery has been a successful experience so far the staff are always nice and helpful
Great experience. All my questions were answered.  They were welcoming and great customer service! Highly recommended.

The staff have been super friendly and welcoming. They actually make me feel really excited for the tattoo removal and the end results. They’ve made what could be a very unpleasant experience into one in which I walk in immediately feeling at ease and leave with a huge smile and not thinking of the pain.
Very quick and efficient
Great customer service and looking forward to my next visit
Had a great experience highly recommend
Diane & Desaray are very attentive. They have made this experience very calming & comfortable. I highly recommend them as their service is top notch!
Both were very friendly and informative. During my session it was great communication. If you are looking for tattoo removal I 100% recommend this location.

Absolutely phenomenal experience from beginning until the end.

Ive been to other locations but this one is hands down the best and actually made me want to go through with the process.

Diane and Deseray were incredible, very sweet, and had amazing energy. Seriously thank you so much for the vibes.

Also the removal process itself (my face) did not hurt as bad as I thought and Deseray explained the process very thoroughly and made me feel very comfortable and at ease, the first session was quick as well.

All in all 10/10 ! Amazing work 🔥

- Johnny
Amazing hospitality! They make you feel at home while maintaining high levels of professionalism.

My third session, felt like I’m at home
Very lovely and welcoming
They always make sure you’re healing properly and love how they always make sure
You’re taken care of
Thank you ladies can wait to see y'all again ❤️

Today was my first tattoo removal session at Removery in Hedwig Village, Houston, and I had a wonderful experience. I’ve wanted to have my tattoos removed for a long time, and Removery made it possible with their excellent service and support.

Zahra walked me through the cost and financing of the unlimited tattoo removal package, helping me save a ton of money in the long run with interest-free payments for 24 months! Her clear explanations and helpfulness made the whole process stress-free.

Andrea was my removal technician, and I couldn’t believe how fast and easy the removal process was! Normally, tattoo removal is very painful and time-consuming, but Andrea managed to treat multiple tattoos from different parts of my body within minutes. The pain was totally bearable for me at Removery.

Additionally, I received great instructions on how to care for my skin afterwards. I feel a lot better knowing that these tattoos I’ve wanted to remove for a long time will now soon be gone.

I highly recommend Removery in Hedwig Village, Houston, for anyone considering tattoo removal. Their professionalism, expertise, and excellent customer service truly stand out.

Update 02/05/2026: I'm still loving my treatment!  I'm with Diane & Desaray now and we always have a good time!
If you want to do a removal I would definitely recommend Removery all of the staff are friendly, very professional , clean I have been coming here going on 3 years! Thank you Removery!

I have been very pleased with the communication from the clinic and the staff is very pleasing to deal with. I am nearing the end of my tattoo removal and look forward to my completion date very soon.

I’ll say this a 100 times.
This is the best tattoo removal process, I couldn’t imagine things going any smoother, and I probably would’ve been traumatized if it wasn’t this easy.

The ladies make this process so smooth and comforting and quick to where you don’t even think twice about being there.

Highly recommend!
Location off I 10 is the best team.
Hands down.

Not to mention, my tattoo looks amazing, no scarring, a gentle hand, and truly cares about your results.
Great customer service. Diane and Desaray were amazing and so helpful and sweet.

Wasn't thorough and detailed as she missed 3-4 dark strokes and she didn't do the suggested passes, therefore I also see other ink. Another 400 dollar service just for what could've been taken care this first time?

Desaray did my latest session for tattoo removal and she made it the most comfortable and relaxing out of all 6 I’ve had. She’s great and very professional. Diane was welcoming and the absolute sweetest bee. It felt like I was talking to a girlfriend I haven’t seen in years! 10/10 with these two sweetie pies
